note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.structure.node module functions.

methods.name: acc_global
methods.description: Get the acceleration of structure node expressed in a global coordinate system.

methods.name: acc_local
methods.description: Get the acceleration of structure node expressed in a local coordinate system.

methods.name: apply
methods.description: Get the translational and rotational applied force of the structure node expressed in the global coordinate system.

methods.name: apply_local
methods.description: Get whether the coordinate system in which generalized applied forces are expressed is a local system.

methods.name: component_id
methods.description: Get the Node component id.

methods.name: convergence
methods.description: Returns the gridpoint convergence value, defined as the ratio of the currenct local force ratio (given by the \(ratio\) method), to the target force ratio (\(ratio.target\)). A value of 1 or less is therefore considered “converged”.

methods.name: damp_local
methods.description: Get the local damping factor of the structure .

methods.name: disp_global
methods.description: Get the displacement of structure node expressed in a global system.

methods.name: disp_local
methods.description: Get the displacement of structure node expressed in a local system.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the Node extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: fix
methods.description: Get velocity-fixity flag expressed in the node-local system. Return values {1, 2, 3} denotes free, fixed, or slaved to target velocity, respectively. Slaved conditions arise from rigid attachment conditions; degrees-of-freedom that are slaved cannot be fixed.

methods.name: fix_local
methods.description: Get the boolean flag for the local coordinate system fixity. True for fixed node-local system, False for free node-local system.

methods.name: force_unbal_global
methods.description: Get the unbalanced force of structure node expressed in a global system.

methods.name: force_unbal_local
methods.description: Get the unbalanced force of structure node expressed in a local system.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the Node group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: node.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the Node. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this Node is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the Node structural element id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: node.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the Node is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: links
methods.description: Get the link objects associated with this node. One link is returned for each side. Returns None if no link is found.

methods.name: local_system
methods.description: Get the local coordinate system of the structure node.

methods.name: mark
methods.description: Get the mark flag. Note that the SEL logic may modify this flag during command processing, cycling, and plotting.

methods.name: mass_added
methods.description: Get the extra mass in addition to the inertial mass at each degree-of-freedom in the node-local system.

methods.name: mass_local
methods.description: Get the mass at each degree-of-freedom in the node-local system.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the current position of this structural element node.

methods.name: pos_reference
methods.description: Get the reference position of this structural element node.

methods.name: ratio
methods.description: Get the local gridpoint mechanical convergence ratio. This is the ratio of unbalanced force to force applied to the node.

methods.name: ratio_target
methods.description: Get the target mechanical force ratio in the node. The default value is 1e-4. A local force ratio (see the \(ratio\) method) below this value is considered converged. See also the \(convergence\) method.

methods.name: resultant
methods.signature: node.resultant() -> tuple of floats (Mx, My, Mxy, Nx, Ny, Nxy)
methods.description: Get stress resultants last calculated for the elements connected to this node. Note that the \(Q_x\) and \(Q_{y1}\) terms are not valid at nodes because they are constant over an element. Stress resultants are expressed in the node surface system; see the structure shell recover surface, structure geogrid recover surface, and structure liner recover surface commands.

returns.type: tuple of floats (Mx, My, Mxy, Nx, Ny, Nxy)

methods.name: set_apply
methods.description: Set a component of the translational and rotational applied force of the structure node expressed in the global coordinate system. Components 0, 1, and 2 are translational and 3,4 and 5 are rotational.

methods.name: set_damp_local
methods.description: Set the local damping factor of the structure .

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the Node extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_fix_local
methods.description: Set the boolean flag for the local coordinate system fixity. True for fixed node-local system, False for free node-local system.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: node.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the Node group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_mark
methods.description: Set the mark flag. Note that the SEL logic may modify this flag during command processing, cycling, and plotting.

methods.name: set_mass_added
methods.signature: node.set_mass_added(comp: int, mass: float) -> (translational: vec3, rotational: vec3)
methods.description: Get the extra mass in addition to the inertial mass at each degree-of-freedom in the node-local system.

methods.name: set_ratio_target
methods.description: Set the target mechanical force ratio in the node. The default value is 1e-4. A local force ratio (see the \(ratio\) method) below this value is considered converged. See also the \(convergence\) method.

methods.name: set_surface_xdir
methods.description: Set the orientation of the surface system. surface system of the node such that the x-direction is aligned with the projection of the surface vector v onto the normal plane, which is defined by the z-direction. This operation can only be performed upon nodes that have a valid surface system (to ensure that the z-direction always corresponds with the average normal direction of at least one of the shell-type SELs using the node). A return value of \(True\) indicates success and \(False\) indicates failure.

methods.name: set_temp_increment
methods.description: Set the the temperature increment that will be applied to the structural node in the next timestep, causing elements connected to it to see changes in stress due to thermal expansion. This value is cleared to zero after every step when thermal expansion stresses are applied.

methods.name: stiff_local
methods.description: Get the stiffness of structure node expressed in a local system. A length 6 tuple is returned. The translational stiffnesses are first followed by the rotational stiffnesses.

methods.name: surface_system
methods.description: Get the surface coordinate system of the structure node.

methods.name: surface_valid
methods.description: Get a boolean flag for surface system validity; \(True\) if the surface system is valid, \(False\) if not. The surface system can be made valid by issuing a structure recovery command.

methods.name: temp_increment
methods.description: Get the the temperature increment that will be applied to the structural node in the next timestep, causing elements connected to it to see changes in stress due to thermal expansion. This value is cleared to zero after every step when thermal expansion stresses are applied.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this Node is live.

methods.name: vel_global
methods.description: Get the velocity of a structure node expressed in a global system.

methods.name: vel_local
methods.description: Get the velocity of a structure node expressed in a local system.
